generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values duty and order, you understand the importance of a strong defense. Recent cuts have left our allies questioning our commitment. A modest increase in defense spending isn't just about more weapons—it's about ensuring our partners know we stand with them. Remember, a stable world starts with reliable alliances. #NationalSecurity #DutyFirst
